ogTitle: Seaview Downs vs Second Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seaview Downs and Second Valley.
heading: Seaview Downs vs Second Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seaview Downs, South Australia and Second Valley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Second Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Seaview Downs (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seaview Downs or Second Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seaview Downs has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Second Valley scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seaview Downs scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Second Valley scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seaview Downs or Second Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Second Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
